channel.title: Mechanical-Pencil on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mechanical-Pencil on smpaget blog

item.title: Mechanical Pencils
item.description:
I like pencils, mechanical pencils specifically I don’t know why. I guess bcause they are refillable. I guess there is also something about the permanence associated with the pencil, that the mark is not forever, it can be changed. Anyway I have a few and below is a brief record of the mechanical pencils I have. Mechanical Pencils _Name__Lead size__Colour__url_Alvin Draft-Matic  .5Blackhttps://www.alvindrafting.com/writing-toolsCross Classic
Century .7Silver (Chrome)https://www.cross.com/cr_en_gb/350305Caran D’ache
ERIDOR chevron.7Silver (Palladium)https://www.carandache.com/gb/en/mechanical-pencil/palladium-coated-ecridor-chevron-mechanical-pencil-p-10136.htm Faber-Castell Grip 1345 .5Blackhttps://www.faber-castell.com/products/Grip1345mechanicalpencil05mmblackmetallic/134599Kaweco Aluminium
Special.5Blackhttps://choosingkeeping.com/products/aluminium_black_kaweco_special_07mm_long_mechanical_pencilOHTO Double
Knock Horizon .5Orangehttps://www.cultpens.com/i/q/OH28079/ohto-horizon-mechanical-pencilPentel Graph Gear
1000 .5Silverhttps://www.pentel.com/products/graph-gear-1000-mechanical-drafting-pencilPentel Sharp Kerry .5Blackhttps://www.pentel.com/products/sharp-kerry-mechanical-pencilPentel P205.5Blackhttps://pentel.ca/product/p205rOting 600 .5Blackhttps://www.rotring.com/us/mechanical-pencils/290-rotring-600-mechanical-pencil-3501178523096.htmlrOting Tikky.5Blackhttps://www.rotring.com/us/mechanical-pencils/309-tikky-mechanical-pencil-3501170770498.html rOting Tikky II  .5Burgundyhttps://www.rotring.com/us/mechanical-pencils/309-tikky-mechanical-pencil-3501170770498.html Sakura SumoGrip .5 Clearhttps://sakuraofamerica.com/brands/sakura-electric-eraser/pencil-mechanical/products/371Uni-ball Kuru Toga
(roulette) .5 Greyhttps://uniballco.com/uni-products/kuru-toga/ (the difference between rOting Tikky and Tikky II is explained here https://paperndigital.blogspot.com/2018/01/rotring-tikky.html) Lead Holders _Name__Lead size__Colour__url_KOH-I-NOOR 59002mm black https://catalogue.koh-i-noor.cz/en/mechanical-clutch-leadholder-2-0-5900-black-27000-g27000.htmlKaweco Aluminium Special2mmblackhttps://choosingkeeping.com/products/aluminium_black_kaweco_special_07mm_long_mechanical_pencil Here is a small video explaining the difference between Mechanical Pencils and Lead Holders https://www.youtube.com/watch?time_continue=1&v=_L5rxYw_ISg
